query:
-- Delete test messages
DELETE m FROM messages m
INNER JOIN conversations c ON m.conversationId = c.id
WHERE c.userId = 1
  AND m.content LIKE 'Test message %'
  AND m.createdAt >= DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-01 00:00:00');

-- Restore user to Pro tier
UPDATE users 
SET 
  subscriptionTier = 'pro',
  subscriptionStatus = 'active',
  stripeCustomerId = 'cus_test_simulation_123',
  stripeSubscriptionId = 'sub_test_simulation_123',
  subscriptionCurrentPeriodEnd = DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
WHERE id = 1;
